provenance.authority: IGN Geoplateforme WFS AOC-VITICOLES:aire_parcellaire (INAO delimited AOC parcels), Licence Ouverte Etalab
provenance.membership_source: data/wine-map/inao-denomination-membership.json (exact member names + parcel counts, pinned in-repo)
provenance.method: GENERALIZED_FROM_OFFICIAL_SOURCE - server-side denom LIKE bound, client-side exact membership match, client-side concave dissolve (same engine as the live pipeline).
caveats: Beaujolais is a dual-role region: the region place france.beaujolais IS the regional 'Beaujolais' AOC (single-entry member list), per the Phase 3 France design.

Beaujolais has a 3-tier pyramid: Beaujolais (regional) < Beaujolais-Villages (sub-regional) < the 10 Crus (top communal AOCs). The enum has no distinct 'sub-regional' level, so v1 models Beaujolais-Villages + the 10 crus flat at appellation_level=village under the region; a later pass can retier if wanted.

The 38 named-village complements (Beaujolais <Commune>, e.g. Beaujolais Lantignie) are the geographic-complement denominations of Beaujolais-Villages - deferred to a depth pass, analogous to Burgundy climats.
Crus are their own communal AOCs (parallel to Beaujolais-Villages, NOT nested inside it): primary_parent = france.beaujolais for all sub-appellations.

modeling_decision: region france.beaujolais: kind=REGION-equivalent place, is_appellation=true, appellation_level=region, appellation_system=AOC, classification=GENERALIZED_FROM_OFFICIAL_SOURCE, tier 1, min_zoom ~4, boundary = dissolve of member 'Beaujolais' (9297 parcels). Sub-appellations (Beaujolais-Villages + 10 crus): is_appellation=true, appellation_level=village, primary_parent=france.beaujolais, tier 2, boundary = dissolve of each member denomination. Grapes: Gamay (all reds), Chardonnay (Beaujolais Blanc/Beaujolais-Villages Blanc). Scoring links: exact-name against the live French regions/appellations reference rows (never fuzzy); crus that lack an exact scoring row stay PENDING. NOT run live - this is reviewable groundwork; the catalog/boundary/flip/links/content build waits on the owner shape-review gate.
